title: Infinite Baguette
description: This Mod adds a baguette that can be consumed an infinite amount of times
body:
# 📘 What Does Our Mod Add:
> The Infinite Baguette Mod Adds an Infinite Food source: The Baguette, This Item fills 7 Bars of hunger and Can be Used infinitly.

# 😀What Makes our mods so special:
> this mod takes a vanilla style so by adding it on minecraft you have the feeling that you are playing minecraft and not another game and if you love the vanilla feeling you should take a look 👀
